rationale: Bug hunt C16: discovered build_context_enrichment() was NOT wired to echo_memory despite C16 status claiming it was. The echo_memory data (deaths_by_biome, dominant_factions_seen) was populated in store_run.gd but never passed through context_builder or build_narrative_context to the LLM prompts. Fix: added echo_memory+total_runs to both context paths (MOS via context_builder, direct via build_narrative_context). build_context_enrichment() now formats cross-run death memory, dominant factions, veteran status, and MOS tension zone for the user prompt. Feature: added 3rd GM few-shot example (end-game with PROGRESS_MISSION + high rep swings) per creator choice q-20260415-005 B. Added PROGRESS_MISSION to GM types list.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C17 (context_builder + build_context_enrichment echo_memory code). Then feature: GFC wrap BroceliandeForest3D (q-20260415-011 creator chose A: wrap_broc) or keyboard/gamepad nav (q-20260415-004 creator chose A: FOCUS_ALL).
